rationale: For a Portuguese resident, the main indirect concern remains energy price uncertainty tied to the Iran deal; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran deal keeps global oil prices volatile, indirectly affecting Portuguese energy bills and cost of living. No resolution this cycle.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy debate has some relevance for Portugal as an Atlantic entry point and destination country, though no binding changes announced.

top_events.title: Canada-EU unity call before G7 summit
top_events.summary: Canada's PM Carney calling for Canada-EU alignment signals potential shifts in transatlantic trade dynamics, with minor indirect relevance for Portugal's export economy.
